commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
.splide__slide.is-active
    border 3px solid transparent !important

[slider-cut] .w-dyn-item, [static-cut] .splide__list
    display flex !important
    flex-basis unset !important
    justify-content start
    grid-row-gap unset
    grid-column-gap unset

    [class$='__c'], [class*='__c ']
        width 100%

.splide__list.w-dyn-items
    justify-content start
    grid-row-gap unset
    grid-column-gap unset

.testimonials-25__item__c
    direction ltr

.testimonials-25__item.is-active
    border 0px solid transparent !important

.story__slider
    .splide__track
        overflow visible !important

[tabs-attached] .w-tab-menu
    display none

[arrows-attached]
    .w-slider-arrow-left, .w-slider-arrow-right
        display none

html.lenis
    height auto

.lenis.lenis-smooth
    scroll-behavior auto

.lenis.lenis-smooth [data-lenis-prevent]
    overscroll-behavior contain

.lenis.lenis-stopped
    overflow hidden

.lenis.lenis-scrolling iframe
    pointer-events none

.st-overflow
    overflow hidden

.form__rows:has(input.is--invalid)
    [sf-goto = 'next']
        opacity .5

//NEEDS TO BE FIXED WITH A JS OBSERVER
.form__rows[sytle*='display: flex']
    //step1, Would you like to enable third parties to interact with us on your behalf?
    &:not(:has([name='Radio9']:checked)), &:has(#Checkbox1_2:checked):has([name='Checkbox2']:not(:checked))
        [sf-goto = 'next']
            opacity .4 !important
            pointer-events none !important

.vds-buffering-spinner
    display none !important

//.custom_player
//display block
//min-height 0
media-player
    --video-border-radius 0px !important

.custom_player.is--9x16
    //opacity .5
    //max-height 90vh
    width 100%
    //max-width 570px/*optional*/
    aspect-ratio 9 / 16

    //display block
    //z-index 1000
    media-player
        height 100% !important
        aspect-ratio 9 / 16 !important

.navbar__c
    z-index 20 !important

.w-nav-overlay
    //pointer-events none !important
    top 0
    z-index 10 !important

.w-nav [data-nav-menu-open]
    display flex !important

//fw changed .gsap_split_line-mask to gsap_split_line ~12/29 '25
.gsap_split_line
    overflow visible !important
    clip-path inset(-.125em 0 -.225em 0)

//move the gear icon to the left out of X
@media (max-width 768px)
    .vds-controls :nth-child(1 of .vds-controls-group) .vds-controls-spacer
        display none !important
